home.title: Next.js-Boilerplate-PostgresQL-Drizzle
home.subtitle: A production-ready Next.js Boilerplate with PostgreSQL & Drizzle ORM. Built for modern web apps, e-commerce, and internal tools. Launch faster with clean code, scalable architecture, and developer-friendly tooling.
home.badge: By A. Z. M. Arif • Full Stack Software Developer

features.title: Next.js + TypeScript
features.description: App Router, typed routes, and a strict TypeScript foundation.

features.title: PostgreSQL + Drizzle
features.description: SQL migrations, typed schema, and Neon serverless support.

features.title: Auth Built-in
features.description: Cookie-based sessions with Better Auth. Switch to custom IdP anytime.

features.title: i18n Ready
features.description: English and Bangla included. Add more locales with next-intl.

featuresPage.title: Everything You Need To Ship Faster
featuresPage.description: A production-ready foundation with Next.js, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM, and a clean modular architecture. No clutter, no fluff — just what you need to start building.

items.title: App Router + TypeScript
items.description: Modern Next.js App Router with strict TypeScript, typed routes, and a scalable folder structure.

items.title: PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM
items.description: Production-ready relational data layer with SQL migrations, typed schema, and Neon serverless support.

items.title: Auth Built-in
items.description: Cookie-based session auth with Better Auth by default. Optionally switch to custom external IdP when needed.

items.title: React Query + Axios
items.description: Server-state and API data caching powered by TanStack React Query with a typed Axios client layer.

items.title: i18n Ready (EN/BN)
items.description: Full internationalization with next-intl. English and Bangla locales included — add more anytime.

items.title: Docs Hub
items.description: Blog-style documentation hub with categorized articles, read-time estimates, and GitHub source links.

items.title: Testing Suite
items.description: Vitest for unit/integration tests, Playwright for end-to-end confidence, React Testing Library for components.

items.title: Docker + CI/CD
items.description: Containerized via Docker and docker-compose. GitHub Actions with lint, typecheck, test, and e2e workflows.

items.title: Security First
items.description: CSP headers, signed session tokens, rate limiting, same-origin checks, and audit logging out of the box.

docsPage.title: Docs You Can Jump Into Right Away
docsPage.description: These pages explain setup, architecture, and workflows so your team can onboard quickly and stay consistent.

items.title: How to Use
items.description: Getting started workflow and day-to-day usage.

items.title: Architecture
items.description: Core system design and module boundaries.

items.title: Guides
items.description: Deployment, maintenance, and project setup guides.
